output.summary: Accessibility compliance audit and test page modernization for Gallery Carousel block. The block already has strong accessibility foundations (role=region, aria-roledescription=carousel, autoplay toggle, pause-on-focus, inert management, prefers-reduced-motion, slide ARIA attributes). Gaps identified: (1) TSX needs Play.svg import for autoplay toggle parity with PHP, (2) CardsCarousel PHP has role=region on swiper-parent but GalleryCarousel PHP already has it - good, (3) TSX autoplay toggle button missing data-label-pause/play attributes present in PHP, (4) TSX carousel region missing aria-labelledby connection to heading, (5) test page needs complete rebuild with DemoContainer wrappers and interactive tests.

fileChanges.description: Add Play.svg import, add data-label-pause/play attributes to autoplay toggle button, ensure aria-labelledby on carousel region connects to ThemeHeading's heading ID
fileChanges.details: 1. Import Play.svg: `import { ReactComponent as PlayIcon } from './resources/Play.svg';` (already imported PauseIcon). 2. On the autoplay toggle button in TSX, add `data-label-pause` and `data-label-play` attributes to match PHP output - these are used by the JS toggle handler. 3. The aria-labelledby on the carousel region div references `${clientId}-heading` but needs to verify ThemeHeading actually outputs an element with that ID. If ThemeHeading auto-generates heading IDs based on block region ID, this is fine. If not, the TSX needs to pass a headingId prop.

fileChanges.description: Add role=region to swiper-parent div (already present - verified), verify aria-labelledby points to the ThemeHeading heading element ID
fileChanges.details: The PHP swiper-parent already has role=region and aria-roledescription=carousel and aria-labelledby. Verify the aria-labelledby value matches the ID that ThemeHeading renders on the h2 element. Current: `aria-labelledby` references `theme_block_region_id() . '-heading'`. ThemeHeading should output `id="{region_id}-heading"` on the heading element. No changes needed IF ThemeHeading follows this pattern. Otherwise add explicit id pass-through.

fileChanges.description: Minor: verify Play.svg is used via inline SVG string (already done). Add aria-live=polite on swiper-wrapper when autoplay is off/paused (already implemented). No changes needed - JS implementation is comprehensive.
fileChanges.details: The JS file already implements: (1) updateSlideAriaAttributes with role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, aria-label with position, (2) inert management on non-loop slides, (3) autoplay toggle with label switching via data attributes, (4) aria-live toggling (off when playing, polite when paused), (5) pause on focusin/resume on focusout, (6) prefers-reduced-motion check. This is fully compliant with the carousel accessibility pattern.

fileChanges.description: Rebuild test page with DemoContainer wrappers and comprehensive interactive test definitions
fileChanges.details: Current test page uses plain h2/p headings instead of takt/demo-container wrappers. Need to rebuild with: (1) DemoContainer wrapper for each variation, (2) Add missing variation for 'Empty Optional Fields' (no eyebrow, no description, no buttons - only heading), (3) Add variation testing all ThemeHeading fields exhaustively, (4) Ensure autoplay+loop variation exists (already does - variation 7), (5) Define interactiveTests for QA automation covering: next/prev navigation, autoplay toggle, loop wrapping behavior.

testPage.rebuildReason: Current test page uses plain h2/p elements instead of takt/demo-container wrappers per test page standards. Need to wrap each variation in DemoContainer with demoTitle and demoDescription.

variations.demoDescription: Both autoplay (5s delay) and loop enabled. Tests autoplay toggle button, pause-on-hover, pause-on-focus, and infinite loop behavior.
Loop enabled, autoplay disabled. Tests that carousel wraps around without automatic rotation.

attributes.heading: Year in Review
attributes.description: A collection of moments from throughout the year.

variations.demoDescription: No heading text provided. Tests aria-label='Gallery Carousel' fallback on section element for accessibility.

interactiveTests.name: Navigate to next slide
interactiveTests.expect: Second slide becomes visible, progress bar advances, previous button becomes enabled

interactiveTests.name: Navigate to previous slide
interactiveTests.expect: Returns to first slide, progress bar resets

interactiveTests.name: Autoplay toggle pauses rotation
interactiveTests.expect: Toggle button changes from pause to play icon, aria-label changes to 'Start slide rotation', slide rotation stops

interactiveTests.name: Autoplay toggle resumes rotation
interactiveTests.expect: Toggle button changes back to pause icon, aria-label changes to 'Stop slide rotation', slide rotation resumes

interactiveTests.name: Loop mode wraps to first slide
interactiveTests.expect: After navigating past last slide, carousel wraps to first slide seamlessly

requirements.requirement: Carousel container has role=region with aria-roledescription=carousel
requirements.evidence: PHP line 38: swiper-parent has role=region, aria-roledescription=carousel. TSX line 250-253: same attributes.

requirements.requirement: Carousel container has aria-labelledby (if visible label) or aria-label
requirements.evidence: PHP line 38: aria-labelledby references heading ID. TSX line 252: aria-labelledby references clientId-heading. Section level fallback aria-label='Gallery Carousel' when heading is empty.
PHP line 44-51: native button element. TSX line 260-269: native button element.

requirements.requirement: Rotation control has dynamic accessible name (Stop/Start slide rotation)
requirements.evidence: PHP: aria-label + data-label-pause/play attributes. JS line 110-128: toggles aria-label between pause/play labels.

requirements.requirement: Rotation control does NOT use aria-pressed
requirements.evidence: No aria-pressed found on autoplay toggle button.

requirements.requirement: Rotation control is first tab-stop inside carousel
requirements.evidence: Both PHP and TSX render autoplay toggle before pagination and navigation in DOM order.
JS lines 131-144: focusin pauses autoplay, focusout resumes only if focus left carousel entirely and was previously playing.
JS lines 8-23: updateSlideAriaAttributes sets role=group, aria-roledescription=slide on each slide.

requirements.requirement: Slides have aria-label with position info (e.g. 'Slide 1 of 5')
Wrapper uses aria-live=off when rotating, polite when paused
requirements.evidence: JS lines 98-101: sets aria-live=off initially when autoplay enabled. Lines 115/122: toggles between polite (paused) and off (playing).

requirements.requirement: Inactive slides use inert attribute (non-loop mode)
requirements.evidence: JS lines 72-92: manages inert attribute on inactive slides when not in loop mode.
Both PHP and TSX: prev/next buttons have aria-label='Previous Item'/'Next Item'.
JS line 26: checks prefers-reduced-motion and disables autoplay. swiper.css lines 103-116: disables transitions and animations.
JS line 2 and TSX line 12: A11y module imported and included in modules array.

gaps.description: TSX autoplay toggle button missing data-label-pause and data-label-play attributes that PHP has
gaps.impact: Editor-only: does not affect frontend. The data attributes are used by the frontend JS for label toggling. Since the TSX button is non-functional in the editor context, this is cosmetic but should match PHP for consistency.
gaps.recommendation: Add data-label-pause and data-label-play to the TSX autoplay toggle button.

gaps.description: GalleryCarousel JS uses inline Play SVG string while Pause.svg and Play.svg files exist in resources/
gaps.impact: Functional - the inline SVG works. But Play.svg exists as a file and could be referenced. However since JS files cannot use PHP theme_block_asset(), the inline approach is the correct pattern for frontend JS.
gaps.recommendation: No change needed. The inline SVG approach in JS is correct per the carousel pattern.

designDecisions.question: Should the TSX autoplay toggle button include data-label-pause/data-label-play attributes?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes, add them for TSX/PHP consistency, even though they are unused in the editor context.
designDecisions.evidence: CardsCarousel PHP and GalleryCarousel PHP both include these data attributes. TSX should match.

designDecisions.question: Should test page variations be wrapped in DemoContainer blocks?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes, per the test page standards in planning-agent.md Phase 8. The current test page uses plain h2/p elements which do not follow the DemoContainer pattern.
designDecisions.evidence: Planning agent Phase 8 states: 'Each block variation on a test page MUST be wrapped in a DemoContainer that describes what the variation tests.'

designDecisions.question: Should a 'No Heading' variation be added to test the aria-label fallback?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes. When no heading is provided, the section element uses aria-label='Gallery Carousel' as fallback. This is an important accessibility behavior that should be tested.
designDecisions.evidence: Carousel a11y pattern requires aria-labelledby (if visible label) or aria-label (if no visible label). The block implements this conditional.

output.qaNote: Focus on: (1) DemoContainer wrappers rendering correctly, (2) all 13 variations displaying properly, (3) interactive tests passing for navigation, autoplay toggle, and loop behavior, (4) accessibility audit verifying ARIA attributes on frontend.
